en: leak, lake, like, lock, lack, lick, luck, look, Luke. What? It's so confusing.
ko: 새다, 호수, 좋아하다, 잠그다, 부족하다, 핥다, 운, 보다, 루크. 뭐? 너무 헷갈려.
ja: leak, lake, like, lock, lack, lick, luck, look, Luke。何？すごく紛らわしい。
zhTW: leak, lake, like, lock, lack, lick, luck, look, Luke。什麼？太容易搞混了。
vi: leak, lake, like, lock, lack, lick, luck, look, Luke. Gì? Khó phân biệt quá.
